Patch Set 2:

I think this change needed to be based on latest change on master.

I've rebased it as such. Dan, care to try another merge?

Srinivas, please make sure to 'git fetch master' and 'git pull master' and 'git rebase origin/master <change>' before you push changes upstream. Your last set of changes have sometimes, 1. Been based on each other, which is frowned upon (makes our jobs harder) 2. Been based on changes that have not been pushed or merged as far as I can tell.
